visual_analysis.description: A black soda can with 'SODA WATER' printed on it, located behind the red can.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' branding, positioned in front of the black soda can.
A white can with 'Milkis' branding, to the right of the red can.
A gold-colored plastic bottle with a blue cap, on the far right.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is in front of and blocking access to the black soda can.
The black soda can, interpreted as 'sprite', is now accessible.
